ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize */,
  "odds_of_winning" TEXT /* Odds of winning the prize */,
  "total_prizes" INTEGER /* Total number of prizes available */,
  "prizes_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of prizes remaining */,
  "prizes_paid" INTEGER /* Number of prizes already paid out */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prize */,
  "prize_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the prize */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the prize is currently active */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of prize (e.g., cash, merchandise, experience) */,
  "prize_details_url" TEXT /* URL to more detailed information about the prize */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lottery_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the lottery game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Scratch-off, Powerball) */,
  "draw_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of draws (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the game started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the game ends */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "game_rules_url" TEXT /* URL to the game rules */,
  "game_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the game */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the game is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lottery game for which tickets were sold */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of an individual lottery ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold in this transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale (quantity * ticket_price) */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location where the sale was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, online) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "sales_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, player) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize claim */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize being claimed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user claiming the prize */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Pending, Approved, Denied) */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize being claimed */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim (e.g., winning ticket, error) */,
  "claim_location" TEXT /* Location where the claim was made */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the claim */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim was approved */,
  "denied_reason" TEXT /* Reason for denying the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_claims_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_claims_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Pending, Approved, Denied) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (e.g., green for approved, red for denied) */,
  "status_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout record */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim for which the payout is made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payout */,
  "payout_date" TEXT /* Date the payout was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment for the payout (e.g., check, direct deposit) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the payout (e.g., winning prize, refund) */,
  "payout_location" TEXT /* Location where the payout was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES prize_claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_location" TEXT /* Location from which the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., claim approval, claim denial) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "sent_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the notification was sent */,
  "sent_location" TEXT /* Location from which the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who won the prize */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize won */,
  "win_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize was won */,
  "win_amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize won */,
  "win_location" TEXT /* Location where the prize was won */,
  "win_ticket_number" TEXT /* Number of the winning ticket */,
  "win_claimed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the prize has been claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_prizes" (
  "game_prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game-prize association */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated lottery game */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated prize */,
  "prize_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the prize is listed for the game */,
  "prize_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the prize can be won per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_prizes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES lottery_games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_prizes_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sales" (
  "game_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game sale association */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated lottery game */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction */,
  "total_sales_amount" REAL /* Total amount of sales for the game */,
  "sales_location" TEXT /* Location where the sales were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sales_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES lottery_games ("game_id")
)
